name: Alchemist
description: There's no sight more beautiful to you than a strange brew bubbling in a beaker, and you consume your ingenious elixirs with abandon.

subclasses.name: Bomber
subclasses.description: Specialize in bombs, throwing them with precision and control.

subclasses.name: Chirurgeon
subclasses.description: A master healer who uses Crafting for Medicine and brews potent elixirs.

subclasses.name: Mutagenist
subclasses.description: Embrace mutagens, gaining their power with reduced drawbacks.

subclasses.name: Toxicologist
subclasses.description: A master of poisons who crafts and applies deadly toxins.

name: Animist
description: You are the interlocutor between the seen and unseen, the voice that connects the mortal and the spiritual.

name: Barbarian
description: Rage consumes you in battle.

subclasses.name: Animal Instinct
subclasses.description: Channel a spirit animal, gaining bestial unarmed attacks.

subclasses.name: Dragon Instinct
subclasses.description: Rage with draconic might and elemental damage.

subclasses.name: Fury Instinct
subclasses.description: Pure, flexible, hard-hitting rage.

subclasses.name: Giant Instinct
subclasses.description: Wield oversized weapons with titanic strength.

subclasses.name: Spirit Instinct
subclasses.description: Channel ancestral spirits, dealing void or vitality damage.

name: Bard
description: You are a master of artistry, a scholar of hidden secrets, and a captivating persuader.

subclasses.name: Enigma
subclasses.description: A muse of secrets and knowledge; grants the True Strike-flavored Bardic Lore and a focus on Recall Knowledge.

subclasses.name: Maestro
subclasses.description: A muse of music and performance; grants the Lingering Composition feat.

subclasses.name: Polymath
subclasses.description: A muse of many disciplines; grants the Versatile Performance feat.

subclasses.name: Warrior
subclasses.description: A muse of battle; grants a martial weapon proficiency and the Martial Performance feat.

name: Champion
description: You are an emissary of a deity, a devoted servant who has taken up a weighty mantle, and you adhere to a code that holds you apart from those around you.

name: Cleric
description: Deities work their will upon the world in infinite ways, and you serve as one of their most stalwart mortal servants.

subclasses.name: Cloistered Cleric
subclasses.description: A scholarly servant; grants a domain and, later, expanded spell access with lighter combat training.

subclasses.name: Warpriest
subclasses.description: A martial servant; grants better armor and weapon training and a Battle Medicine-style resilience.

name: Druid
description: The power of nature is impossible to resist.

subclasses.name: Animal
subclasses.description: Grants an animal companion and the Animal Empathy feat.

subclasses.name: Leaf
subclasses.description: Grants a leshy familiar and the Leshy Familiar feat, focusing on growth and healing.

subclasses.name: Storm
subclasses.description: Grants the Storm Born feat and the Tempest Surge focus spell.

subclasses.name: Untamed
subclasses.description: Grants the Untamed Form (wild shape) feat and shapeshifting focus magic.

name: Exemplar
description: As the war god died, his power rained through the many planes of creation, sparking conflict and instilling divine energy in those previously without it.

name: Fighter
description: Fighting for honor, greed, loyalty, or simply the thrill of battle, you are an undisputed master of weaponry and combat techniques.

name: Gunslinger
description: While some fear projectile weapons, you savor the searing flash, wild kick, and cloying smoke that accompanies a gunshot, or snap of the cable and telltale thunk of your crossbow just before your bolt finds purchase.

subclasses.name: Drifter
subclasses.description: A versatile gunfighter blending firearms and melee.

subclasses.name: Pistolero
subclasses.description: A quick-draw duelist with one-handed firearms.

subclasses.name: Sniper
subclasses.description: A patient marksman landing devastating aimed shots.

subclasses.name: Vanguard
subclasses.description: A frontline gunner using heavy firearms and area attacks.

name: Inventor
description: Any tinkerer can follow a diagram to make a device, but you invent the impossible!

subclasses.name: Armor Innovation
subclasses.description: A powered suit of armor you tinker with and upgrade.

subclasses.name: Construct Innovation
subclasses.description: A loyal robotic companion you build and improve.

subclasses.name: Weapon Innovation
subclasses.description: A signature weapon packed with experimental upgrades.

name: Investigator
description: You seek to uncover the truth, doggedly pursuing leads to reveal the plots of devious villains, discover ancient secrets, or unravel other mysteries.

subclasses.name: Alchemical Sciences
subclasses.description: Investigate with chemistry, gaining quick alchemy and versatile vials.

subclasses.name: Empiricism
subclasses.description: Rely on keen observation and deduction to Recall Knowledge.

subclasses.name: Forensic Medicine
subclasses.description: Study wounds and bodies; excel at Medicine and healing.

subclasses.name: Interrogation
subclasses.description: Read people and pursue leads through conversation.

name: Kineticist
description: The power of the elements flows from within you.

subclasses.name: Air
subclasses.description: Command wind and lightning — mobile, precise impulses.

subclasses.name: Earth
subclasses.description: Command stone and soil — sturdy, defensive impulses.

subclasses.name: Fire
subclasses.description: Unleash flame — aggressive, high-damage impulses.

subclasses.name: Metal
subclasses.description: Shape metal — sharp, versatile impulses.

subclasses.name: Water
subclasses.description: Flow with water and ice — control and healing impulses.

subclasses.name: Wood
subclasses.description: Channel living wood — protective, sustaining impulses.

name: Magus
description: Combining the physicality and technique of a warrior with the ability to cast arcane magic, you seek to perfect the art of fusing spell and strike.

subclasses.name: Inexorable Iron
subclasses.description: Two-handed weapons and toughness; a mighty Spellstrike.

subclasses.name: Laughing Shadow
subclasses.description: Mobile, one-handed finesse with a free hand.

subclasses.name: Sparkling Targe
subclasses.description: Sword-and-board, warding yourself with magical shields.

subclasses.name: Starlit Span
subclasses.description: Spellstrike at range with a bow or thrown weapon.

subclasses.name: Twisting Tree
subclasses.description: Master a staff, blending reach and versatility.

name: Monk
description: The strength of your fist flows from your mind and spirit.

name: Oracle
description: Your conduit to divine power eschews the traditional channels of prayer and servitude—you instead glean sacred truths and great mysteries embodied in overarching concepts, whether because you perceive the common ground across multiple deities or circumvent their power entirely.

subclasses.name: Ancestors
subclasses.description: Commune with ancestral spirits for guidance and skill.

subclasses.name: Battle
subclasses.description: A martial oracle who wades into the fray.

subclasses.name: Bones
subclasses.description: Command death and undeath.

subclasses.name: Cosmos
subclasses.description: Channel the stars and the night sky.

subclasses.name: Flames
subclasses.description: Wield searing fire and light.

subclasses.name: Life
subclasses.description: A healer bound to the cycle of life.

subclasses.name: Lore
subclasses.description: A keeper of secret knowledge.

subclasses.name: Tempest
subclasses.description: Command storms, wind, and water.

name: Psychic
description: The mind can perceive truths hidden to fine-tuned instruments, house more secrets than any tome, and move objects and hearts more deftly than any lever.

subclasses.name: The Distant Grasp
subclasses.description: Telekinesis — move and strike from afar.

subclasses.name: The Infinite Eye
subclasses.description: Divination and sharpened senses.

subclasses.name: The Oscillating Wave
subclasses.description: Fire and cold, entropy and energy.

subclasses.name: The Silent Whisper
subclasses.description: Words and thoughts that pierce the mind.

subclasses.name: The Unbound Step
subclasses.description: Teleportation and swift movement.

subclasses.name: The Tangible Dream
subclasses.description: Shape illusions into something real.

name: Ranger
description: Some rangers believe civilization wears down the soul, but still needs to be protected from wild creatures.

subclasses.name: Flurry
subclasses.description: Reduce the multiple attack penalty against your hunted prey.

subclasses.name: Precision
subclasses.description: Deal extra precision damage on your first hit against your hunted prey each turn.

subclasses.name: Outwit
subclasses.description: Gain bonuses to skills and AC against your hunted prey.

name: Rogue
description: You are skilled and opportunistic.

subclasses.name: Ruffian
subclasses.description: Intimidation-based bruiser; use medium armor and sneak attack with simple weapons.

subclasses.name: Scoundrel
subclasses.description: Deception/Diplomacy trickster; feint to make foes flat-footed.

subclasses.name: Thief
subclasses.description: Classic thief; add Dexterity instead of Strength to finesse melee damage.

subclasses.name: Mastermind
subclasses.description: Cunning tactician; Recall Knowledge to make foes flat-footed.

name: Sorcerer
description: You didn't choose to become a spellcaster-you were born one.

subclasses.name: Aberrant
subclasses.description: Alien power from beyond — occult magic.

subclasses.name: Angelic
subclasses.description: Celestial heritage — divine magic.

subclasses.name: Demonic
subclasses.description: Abyssal destruction — divine magic.

subclasses.name: Diabolic
subclasses.description: Infernal cunning — divine magic.

subclasses.name: Draconic
subclasses.description: The might of dragons — arcane magic.

subclasses.name: Elemental
subclasses.description: Raw elemental force — primal magic.

subclasses.name: Fey
subclasses.description: First World whimsy — primal magic.

subclasses.name: Hag
subclasses.description: Cursed heritage — occult magic.

subclasses.name: Imperial
subclasses.description: Arcane bloodline of old empires — arcane magic.

subclasses.name: Undead
subclasses.description: The chill of undeath — divine magic.

name: Summoner
description: You can magically beckon a powerful being called an eidolon to your side, serving as the mortal conduit that anchors it to the world.

subclasses.name: Beast Eidolon
subclasses.description: A bestial companion of claw and fang.

subclasses.name: Construct Eidolon
subclasses.description: A crafted, resilient guardian.

subclasses.name: Dragon Eidolon
subclasses.description: A proud draconic ally.

subclasses.name: Elemental Eidolon
subclasses.description: A being of raw element.

subclasses.name: Fey Eidolon
subclasses.description: A capricious First World spirit.

subclasses.name: Plant Eidolon
subclasses.description: A verdant, growing companion.

subclasses.name: Celestial Eidolon
subclasses.description: A radiant celestial ally.

subclasses.name: Fiendish Eidolon
subclasses.description: A sinister lower-planar ally.

subclasses.name: Psychopomp Eidolon
subclasses.description: A shepherd of souls.

subclasses.name: Undead Eidolon
subclasses.description: A restless undead companion.

name: Swashbuckler
description: Many warriors rely on brute force, weighty armor, or cumbersome weapons.

subclasses.name: Battledancer
subclasses.description: Gain panache by Performing — graceful and inspiring.

subclasses.name: Braggart
subclasses.description: Gain panache by Demoralizing — brash and bold.

subclasses.name: Fencer
subclasses.description: Gain panache by Feinting — cunning and precise.

subclasses.name: Gymnast
subclasses.description: Gain panache with Athletics — acrobatic and forceful.

subclasses.name: Wit
subclasses.description: Gain panache with Bon Mot — clever and charming.

name: Thaumaturge
description: The world is full of the unexplainable: ancient magic, dead gods, and even stranger things.

subclasses.name: Amulet
subclasses.description: A protective charm warding you from harm.

subclasses.name: Bell
subclasses.description: A ringing tool that unsettles and banishes.

subclasses.name: Chalice
subclasses.description: A vessel of healing and vitality.

subclasses.name: Lantern
subclasses.description: A light that reveals the hidden.

subclasses.name: Mirror
subclasses.description: A reflection you can send forth.

subclasses.name: Regalia
subclasses.description: Symbols of authority that command respect.

subclasses.name: Tome
subclasses.description: A book of esoteric lore.

subclasses.name: Wand
subclasses.description: A conduit for a blast of energy.

subclasses.name: Weapon
subclasses.description: A martial implement for the front line.

name: Witch
description: You command powerful magic, not through study or devotion, but as an agent for an otherworldly patron that even you don't entirely understand.

subclasses.name: Faith's Flamekeeper
subclasses.description: A divine patron of fire and zeal; grants the divine tradition and Phase Familiar.

subclasses.name: The Inscribed One
subclasses.description: An arcane patron of secret text; grants the arcane tradition and Discern Secrets.

subclasses.name: The Resentment
subclasses.description: An occult patron of spite; grants the occult tradition and Evil Eye.

subclasses.name: Silence in Snow
subclasses.description: A primal patron of cold silence; grants the primal tradition and Clinging Ice.

subclasses.name: Spinner of Threads
subclasses.description: An occult patron of fate; grants the occult tradition and Nudge Fate.

subclasses.name: Starless Shadow
subclasses.description: An occult patron of darkness; grants the occult tradition and Shroud of Night.

subclasses.name: Wilding Steward
subclasses.description: A primal patron of the wild; grants the primal tradition and a nature-themed hex.

name: Wizard
description: You are an eternal student of the secrets of the universe, using your mastery of magic to cast powerful spells.

subclasses.name: Improved Familiar Attunement
subclasses.description: Your familiar is more capable, gaining an extra ability and improving as you level.

subclasses.name: Metamagical Experimentation
subclasses.description: Gain a metamagic feat and swap metamagic options during your studies.

subclasses.name: Spell Blending
subclasses.description: Trade prepared spell slots to prepare higher-level spells or extra cantrips.

subclasses.name: Spell Substitution
subclasses.description: Swap prepared spells for others during the day with a short study.
